title: Mole Mod
description: A fun mod that once had the sole purpose of only adding moles to Minecraft, but is now so much more!
body:
![Mole Mod: The Nut-date logo image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/97411951/232576070-ed76c9ed-f232-46b7-9462-bc7cca971838.png)

## INFO

Mole Mod is a fun mod made by MoleLovers United, with spelling help by his grandkids, great-grandkids, and great-great-grandkids. Mole Mod was made using MCreator.

 
## CONTENTS

Mole Mod has tons of fun content such as:

* 13 different Mole mobs!
* 6 other non-Mole mods!
* 5 brand new biomes!
* Progression: After beating each major boss, unlock something new!
* 20+ resources, a lot of which are post ender dragon!
* 10 brand new Nut items!
* 6 new armor sets!
* Tons of new tools!
* 45+ advancements that help you through the whole progression!
* And much more!!!

 

[If you want to see some of these things in action, check out the Images page or watch the trailer here!](https://youtu.be/VExe25BGJsc)

## IMPORTANT

Mole Mod is still in relatively early development and there's lots of stuff we still want to add, and this also means there's bound to be bugs that we missed!

We are also hard at work on a Wiki page to help with people just getting started playing Mole Mod. Hopefully, the advancements will help with most of your troubles for now though!
